---
title: "Design"
format: html
---

Design shapes how we experience the world. What Antony Gormley said about Art also applies to Design, it being "the means by which we communicate what it feels like to be alive."

Here, I collect several of my favourite examples of art and design.

**Buildings and Spaces**

The [Guggenheim museum](https://www.guggenheim-bilbao.eus/en), Bilbao, Spain.   
[Reina Sofia museum](https://www.museoreinasofia.es/en), Madrid, Spain.   
The [High Line](https://www.thehighline.org/), New York, USA.  
The [Alhambra](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alhambra), Granada, Spain.   

**Sculpture**

[Another Place](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Another_Place_(sculpture)), Crosby, Merseyside.   
[Golden Boy of Pye Corner](https://www.historic-uk.com/HistoryMagazine/DestinationsUK/The-Golden-Boy-of-Pye-Corner/), London.   
[El Oso y El Madrono](https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Estatua_del_Oso_y_el_Madro%C3%B1o), Madrid, Spain.   
  


**Clothes**

Trainers by [Adidas](https://www.fatbuddhastore.com/adidas-sneaker-history-i192#1).  
[Psylo](https://psylofashion.com/), Camden.
